title: cirsium neomexicanum var. utahense
intro: Cirsium neomexicanum var. utahense, also known as the Utah Plume Thistle or Utah Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The roots and leaves of Cirsium neomexicanum var. utahense have been found to have medicinal properties that may help to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its health benefits.
